response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with broad full-stack experience and notable low-latency systems work in DLang at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, plus C/C++ exposure at National Instruments a decade ago. However, the role specifically requires modern C++ or Rust expertise and geospatial/navigation pipeline experience. While GISCollective demonstrates genuine geospatial domain interest, the primary languages used (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) don't align with the C++/Rust requirement, and recent C++ commercial experience is absent.
strengths: Geospatial domain experience via GISCollective platform
Low-latency distributed systems background from Sociomantic
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, testing rigor
concerns: No recent modern C++ or Rust commercial experience
Last C/C++ role was 2014-2015 at National Instruments
No direct navigation/routing or tiling pipeline experience
